detaileddescription.para: T.R. Smith, J.P. Schlegel, T. Hibiki, M. Ishii, Mechanistic modeling of interfacial area transport in large diameter pipes, International Journal of Multiphase Flow, Volume 47, 2012, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijmultiphaseflow.2012.06.009 and Joseph L. Bottini, Taiyang Zhang, Caleb S. Brooks, Validation of two-group interfacial area transport equation in boiling flow, International Journal of Heat and Mass Transfer, 2024, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijheatmasstransfer.2024.125515
